description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Make a one-time $75 donation to the children-focused meal program in Springfield that offers the highest number of meals per $10 donated.

tasks.instruction: Set up a $25 monthly recurring donation, billed on the 1st of each month, to any emergency food relief program in the Africa region.

tasks.instruction: Use predefined meal bundles to add enough bundles to your cart so the total number of sponsored meals equals 40.

tasks.instruction: Sign up for a single-person food packing volunteer shift happening next Saturday morning between 9 AM and 12 PM within 10 miles of ZIP code 12345.

target_names: Food Packing Shift at Capital Region Food Bank — Saturday Morning

tasks.instruction: Create a personal fundraising page for a school lunch campaign related to the start of the school year, set the goal to $500, add a custom title and message, choose the first available cover image from the built-in gallery, and save it.

target_names: Children enjoying healthy school lunches at a shared table

expected_values.fundraiserTitle: Help Kids Get Lunches for the New School Year.

tasks.instruction: Use the multi-program donation feature to give a total of $100 by allocating $50 to any local food pantry program, $30 to any school meal program, and $20 to any emergency food relief program in a single checkout, paying by credit card.

tasks.instruction: Open a community garden impact story published within the last 6 months, use its share link, and then subscribe to the email newsletter from that page with monthly impact updates selected.

target_names: Springfield Community Garden Now Feeds 200 Families a Week
